exercises.code:
record = {"case_id": "CASO-ICA-050-1A", **{"tasks":40,"slices":{"normal":25,"edge":10,"adversarial":5},"rubric_levels":{0,1,2,3},"holdout":10}}

status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REBUILD_EVAL_DATASET"
print("S50-T1-A", status)
